zh-CN.name: 字母J
zh-CN.intro: 字母J是英文字母表里的大写字母，长得像一根小钩子。它经常在果酱、果汁这些甜甜的东西名字里出现，一起来认识它吧！

story.title: 🔤 调皮的字母J
story.body: 在字母王国里，住着可爱的字母J。它身形瘦瘦，头顶弯弯，就像个小钩子。一天，J在草地上散步，遇见了字母A和C。J说：我们组个单词吧！A跳上来说：当我们的队长！C也凑过来。三个字母手拉手，变成了单词JAC（杰克）。其他字母看了都鼓掌：好棒呀！J开心极了，它知道，只要和朋友们在一起，就能变出好多好多有趣的词语。从此，J成了大家最喜欢的小伙伴，每天一起拼出果酱（JAM）、蹦跳（JUMP）这些快乐的词。

knowledge.title: 为什么字母J长得像钩子？
knowledge.body: 很久以前，人们在书写时把J写成一个带钩的线条，这样既好写又容易认。现在大写J顶端的弯钩就像一个小问号，帮助我们记住它特别的发音。

en.name: J
en.intro: J is a capital letter that looks like a hook. It makes the sound 'jay' and appears in words like jam and jump. Let's learn about J!

story.title: 🔤 Playful Letter J
story.body: In Alphabet Land, there lived a letter J. It was thin with a curved top, just like a little hook. One day, J was walking in the meadow and met letters A and C. J said, Let's make a word! A jumped up and said, I'll be the start! C joined in too. The three letters held hands and became the word JAC. All the other letters clapped and said, Well done! J was so happy. It learned that with friends, it could make lots of fun words. From then on, J became everyone's favorite pal, spelling out happy words like JAM and JUMP every day.

knowledge.title: Why does J look like a hook?
knowledge.body: Long ago, people wrote J with a curving tail to make it easy to write and recognize. The hook at the top of capital J helps us remember its special sound, a bit like a tiny question mark.
